title: Case Converter
description: Tokenize any text and convert to 13 styles — camelCase, PascalCase, snake_case, CONSTANT_CASE, kebab-case, Title Case and more; batch line mode, CJK-aware, smart acronym splitting.

notice.title: Fully local
notice.body: Tokenizing and conversion run entirely in your browser. Multi-line input is converted line by line, blank lines preserved.

input.label: Input
input.placeholder: Type any identifier, e.g. parseHTTPResponse, hello_world, foo-bar-baz (multi-line OK)

output.heading: All styles
output.hint: Click any result to copy. The token chips show the split of the first line.
